text.message: Was surprised you didn’t point right at the start
sorry, that port makes sense for me
I felt if I pointed right looking for a race, you would trade ore and grain for brick
Pointing to it was a cross my fingers sort of play
for what it's worth I am playing without ore, and no road connect
I mean white has a great one, I think he gets road more often
Why would you pay almost half a city for a sheep
ore + a card felt too good
a mistake in hindsight I see
given I ported 4 cards for the sheep
Great trade for u, blue was selling
what good is ore without sheep
now he has sheep + brick port
It’s ore and wheat that make cities
it is a low ore game
Which is why it was crazy for u to pay that to get a settle
that settle is great for his game, don't you agree?
3:1 port with a decent sheep + extra brick
He would’ve had it soon anyway
you will soon see when blue crushes us
I wouldn't dump all my wood if I had road intentions
I hope you take road soon blue
take road when you can white
No. 6s is all we can hope for
Yeah then I could take army
I need that to have a chance
I need army and you’re popping devs
I don’t care what blue even has, I need that army
Then I’ll have to pop even more
you on army is worse than me on it, and you need 3 more orbits min
You’re not convincing me to not go for army
don't lose sight of blue or white, is my point
You’re about to win which is all we need to know
you have all the vps (except one)
Well how many do u have
Black is the only threat here
The question was as to why you would rob me
I can’t get anything and black is a couple rolls from winning
or you are on 8 for me
Throw the game if u want
red - I am not even close
as you think I might be
Then play your knight you say you have
white gets army I think now
I will play my RB this round
You’ve been gaslighting this whole game
Just a shame whites a fool
how is stating the truth that I have less VPs gaslighting?
I don't think I have robbed you even once red
not sure how that is kingmaking
guy has army in hand, and needs just 2 roads to win
and you said white was throwing?
I mean I’m pretty sure white had the win in hand a couple orbits ago lol
if you ask me, white has played flawless here
red - I want to tell you that I have 0 VPs
that will give you both a sense of how many VPs each of you got
and you said I am gaslighting?
You would not believe how frustrating it is to keep pulling VPs when you want knights
I mean 4 VPs is better than getting army (which is 2 points)
I mean I would’ve preferred for a couple of those to be knights
